_comment: Curated voice presets shipped with the plugin. Each preset has a Fish Audio model_id and a short character description. Onboarding lets the user pick one as their dispatcher_voice; complete:project always uses the dj-fred celebration voice.

presets.label: Tired dispatcher
presets.description: Worn-down, sighing — the 'I've been cleaning up after you all night' register. Default. Fits the passive-aggressive conceit perfectly.

presets.label: Alarmed dispatcher
presets.description: Loud, energetic, slightly panicked. 'Stop right there!' register — closer to a flustered controller losing his grip on the rank.

celebration.label: DJ Fred
celebration.description: High-energy DJ — used for project-complete fanfare, regardless of the chosen dispatcher voice.

audition_lines.text: Attention household. If anyone can hear this, Claude is looking for the user. Thank you.
The project has been successfully completed.
